# Non-Human Identity Software

An independent buyer's guide and resource center for security practitioners evaluating non-human identity (NHI) security software — vendor-neutral analysis of NHI governance platforms, secrets management tools, workload identity solutions, and certificate lifecycle management. No vendor relationships, sponsorships, or affiliate arrangements.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/) — Overview of the non-human identity software market, site structure, and what this independent guide covers.
- [Why This Guide Exists](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/why/) — Why non-human identities now outnumber human accounts and what that means for security architecture — the founding premise of this independent buyer's guide.
- [Subscribe](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/subscribe/) — The Independent Defender newsletter: biweekly, free, vendor-neutral coverage of NHI security and adjacent enterprise security categories.
- [NHI Security Market Landscape](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/landscape/) — How the NHI security market is structured: vendor categories, architectural trade-offs, and a framework for deciding which platform fits your environment.
- [NHI Security Vendor Index](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/landscape/vendors/) — Every significant NHI security vendor by functional category: NHI governance, secrets management, workload identity, CLM, and PAM with NHI extension. No sponsored placements.
- [NHI Compliance & Governance](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/landscape/compliance/) — How NHI governance is shifting from periodic access reviews to continuous runtime enforcement — driven by agentic AI liability and cyber insurance requirements.
- [The NHI Market Direction](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/landscape/market-direction/) — How the NHI market is shifting from secrets management to identity governance, and what agentic AI means for buying decisions.
- [NHI Security Guides](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/) — Five independent guides covering NHI security: category orientation, compliance mapping, vendor evaluation, implementation, and the agentic AI frontier.
- [NHI vs. Secrets Managers vs. CNAPP](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/nhi-vs-secrets-managers-vs-cnapp/) — Where secrets managers, CNAPPs, and dedicated NHI platforms each stop — and how to tell whether the gap between them is worth a fourth tool.
- [NHI Audit & Compliance Mapping](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/nhi-audit-compliance-mapping/) — What auditors and underwriters actually require for NHI governance — SOC 2, NIST SP 800-53, PCI DSS 4.0.1, ISO/IEC 27001:2022, the EU AI Act, and DORA.
- [NHI RFP Framework](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/nhi-rfp-framework/) — A vendor-neutral RFP framework for evaluating NHI security platforms: 12 requirements across four categories, plus five vendor demo screening questions.
- [NHI Governance Rollout Guide](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/nhi-rollout/) — Phased guide to NHI discovery, ownership mapping, and staged enforcement across AWS, GCP, and Azure — each phase designed for safe, incremental rollout.
- [Agentic AI Identity Controls](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/guides/owasp-agentic-ai-identity-controls/) — The OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications, mapped to concrete identity architecture controls — with diagrams and implementation steps.
- [NHI Platform Comparisons](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/) — Independent head-to-head NHI security platform comparisons — technical differentiation, deployment fit, and a direct verdict. No vendor affiliation.
- [Astrix vs. Oasis Security](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/astrix-vs-oasis/) — SaaS-origin OAuth governance vs. cloud-origin NHI platform: independent head-to-head for security teams evaluating dedicated NHI platforms.
- [Entro Security vs. Clutch](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/entro-vs-clutch/) — SDLC-integrated NHI and secrets governance vs. enterprise-wide identity lineage: independent head-to-head comparison.
- [Aembit vs. HashiCorp Vault](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/aembit-vs-hashicorp-vault/) — The architectural fork between secretless workload identity (Aembit) and the established secrets engine (HashiCorp Vault / IBM). Independent comparison.
- [CyberArk vs. HashiCorp Vault](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/cyberark-vs-hashicorp-vault/) — Enterprise machine identity platform vs. developer-native secrets engine. Independent comparison of CyberArk (Palo Alto Networks) and HashiCorp Vault (IBM).
- [CyberArk vs. BeyondTrust](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/cyberark-vs-beyondtrust/) — Two PAM Leaders with different NHI footprints after significant M&A — CyberArk (Palo Alto Networks) vs. BeyondTrust. Independent head-to-head.
- [GitGuardian vs. Astrix](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/comparisons/gitguardian-vs-astrix/) — Secrets detection built outward vs. SaaS OAuth governance built inward: independent head-to-head of two NHI platforms.
- [Free NHI Security Tools](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/) — Free calculators for NHI security — estimate ratios and exposure, decode OAuth grants, compare vendors, and find out where to look first.
- [NHI Vendor Comparison Tool](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/vendor-comparison/) — Filter and compare NHI security vendors by category, identity standards, deployment model, and pricing tier. Independent, no sponsored placements.
- [NHI Risk Self-Check](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/risk-self-check/) — A nine-question self-check surfacing where machine identity risk is concentrated today, pointing to specific checks and guide sections worth reading next.
- [OAuth Scope Decoder](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/oauth-scope-decoder/) — Decode OAuth scopes a third-party app was granted on Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, or Salesforce into plain English, with a risk read for the combination.
- [Rotation Debt Calculator](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/rotation-debt-calculator/) — Turn your credential rotation cadence into a cumulative exposure figure and see what addressing your never-rotated bucket would buy you.
- [NHI-to-Human Ratio Calculator](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/ratio-calculator/) — Estimate your NHI-to-human identity ratio from your own environment counts — applications, cloud accounts, CI/CD pipelines, and SaaS integrations.
- [Privilege Waste Calculator](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/privilege-waste-calculator/) — Turn your unused-permissions percentage into an actual count of dormant permissions, including how many are high-risk action types.
- [Proxy Routing Simulator](https://nonhumanidentitysoftware.com/tools/architectural-simulation/) — Simulate shadow logging vs. hard block routing for orphaned NHI traffic, and see the effect on security visibility, pipeline stability, and your audit trail.
